name: PyTorch torchtriton Dependency Confusion
description: Dependency confusion attack on PyTorch nightly builds. Malicious torchtriton on PyPI overrides internal package, exfiltrates SSH keys, environment variables, system data, and files from home directory.

affected_packages.name: torchtriton
affected_packages.note: All PyPI versions are malicious. Legitimate package is only on PyTorch's private index. Affected PyTorch nightly between Dec 25-30, 2022.

remediation: Uninstall torchtriton from PyPI: pip uninstall torchtriton
Reinstall PyTorch nightly from official channel
Rotate SSH keys and all credentials on affected systems
Audit files in home directory for exfiltration
Use --extra-index-url carefully - prefer --index-url for private packages
